features.featureTitle: Introduce early 2000s athletic/sports visual accents into the existing 1970s retro theme across the entire app. Add bold condensed sans-serif sport fonts (e.g., Impact-style or a condensed athletic face) for select headings, callouts, and nav hover states. Incorporate jersey-style large numerals for issue numbers and page indicators. Add dynamic diagonal stripe or swoosh motifs as decorative dividers and section borders — rendered in CSS — using the existing retro color palette (rust, mustard, avocado) augmented with crisp white and a deep navy or black for sporty contrast. Keep the 1970s newsprint base intact; the athletic elements should feel like a retro sports magazine crossover, not a full rebrand.
